texto: I think Alison Krauss is one of the most amazing singers ever. As a songwriter - this is gonna sound cheesy - I love Randy Newman. And my mom passed on a love of Bob Dylan and Joni Mitchell. At one point I was so into the Indigo Girls, just like I was so into the Dixie Chicks, those female harmonies.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cam: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I think Alison Krauss is one of the most amazing singers ever. As a songwriter - this is gonna so…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love, mom pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mom e think.

frase_original: I think Alison Krauss is one of the most amazing singers ever. As a songwriter - this is gonna sound cheesy - I love Randy Newman. And my mom passed on a love of Bob Dylan and Joni Mitchell. At one point I was so into the Indigo Girls, just like I was so into the Dixie Chicks, those female harmonies.
